fields.first_meeting_text: You ask about work. He weighs you for a second, then nods toward a soft storefront hit.
fields.standard_offer_text: Same kind of store job. Fast in, fast out, low profile.
fields.nothing_available_text: Nothing moving right now. Check back next cycle.

fields.first_meeting_text: Carla pulls you aside and says she has a cleaner, better paying variation lined up.
fields.standard_offer_text: She has another warehouse-adjacent robbery ready if you're still reliable.
fields.nothing_available_text: Carla says inventory is thin tonight.

fields.first_meeting_text: Mickey taps the felt and tells you the bigger protection money is finally on the table.
fields.standard_offer_text: High-value protection run. Better cut, hotter fallout.
fields.nothing_available_text: Mickey shrugs. No one worth shaking tonight.

fields.first_meeting_text: Word comes through the clerk: someone skipped bond and needs collecting.
fields.standard_offer_text: Another bondsman debt surfaced. Quiet pickup if you move now.
fields.nothing_available_text: No fresh paper crossed the desk this cycle.

fields.first_meeting_text: The foreman asks if you can move off-manifest freight without asking questions.
fields.standard_offer_text: Same route family, heavier package, better money.
